dependents.name: bash
dependents.description: Bash executes shell scripts and links against libc.

dependents.name: coreutils
dependents.description: GNU coreutils commands exercise libc process, locale, and file APIs.

dependents.name: grep
dependents.description: grep scans files with libc-backed regular expression and I/O behavior.

dependents.name: gawk
dependents.description: gawk parses and formats records through libc runtime services.

dependents.name: sed
dependents.description: sed transforms stream input through libc-backed file and regex operations.

dependents.name: python3-minimal
dependents.description: Python starts an interpreter and calls libc through the platform runtime.

dependents.name: findutils
dependents.description: findutils traverses directories with libc filesystem calls.

dependents.name: tar
dependents.description: tar reads and writes archives through libc file APIs.

dependents.name: gzip
dependents.description: gzip streams compressed data through libc file APIs.
